issues.offending_span: current ratio of approximately 1.00 in Q4 2025 [K008][C011]
issues.explanation: C011 is an income statement chunk containing Revenue, Gross Profit, Operating Income, Net Income, EBITDA, EPS, and R&D Expenses. It does not contain balance sheet data (current assets or current liabilities) needed to support the current ratio claim. Only K008 supports this calculation.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove C011 from the citation for the current ratio claim. The citation should only reference K008, or cite an appropriate balance sheet chunk if available.
